narrative:
Precinct Oxford Township (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 695 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.8 percentage points.
